flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Cox College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (50.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cox College fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (749 → 540).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cox College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.6k → $14.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cox College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
